questions.question: What is the orange cat doing to the black and white cat?
questions.answer_key: The orange cat stands over the black and white cat and gently swats at it
questions.rationale: Main action and interaction between primary subjects

questions.question: Describe the positions of the cats in the scene.
questions.answer_key: An orange cat stands over a lying black and white cat, with another cat partially visible sitting nearby
required_visual_evidence: black and white cat lying down
questions.rationale: Spatial relationships essential for scene comprehension

questions.question: What type of flooring and lighting are visible in the room?
questions.answer_key: The room has hardwood flooring and is dimly lit
questions.rationale: Environmental context helps establish scene atmosphere
